front: What are the mechanisms of T-cell exhaustion in chronic infection and cancer?
back: T-cell exhaustion: progressive loss of effector function (IL-2, TNF-alpha, IFN-gamma). Transcription factors: TOX, NR4A. Exhaustion markers: PD-1, TIM-3, LAG-3, TIGIT. Epigenetic stability of exhaustion limits checkpoint inhibitor efficacy. Strategies: early intervention, combination therapy.
